name: Portal Pusher
author: Poki
description: In Portal Pusher, you control a character that has to control portals and move through them to make it to the end of the level! Using a special button, you can change portals into moveable blocks and back. You can use this to move the portals around and create a way to the exit. There are 25 challenging puzzles to complete. Can you make it through them all? How to play Portal Pusher? Movement: WASD or arrow keys Jump: Spacebar Restart: R Back to main menu: ESC Who created Portal Pusher? Portal Pusher was created by Robert Alvarez. Play their other games on Poki: Jumping Shell , Jumpossess and Grapple Grip ! How can I play Portal Pusher for free? You can play Portal Pusher for free on Poki. Can I play Portal Pusher on mobile devices and desktop? Portal Pusher can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
